category_sources: Official repository README describes it as an LSP interface over TypeScript tsserver for editors.
source_facts.description says typescript-language-server is a Language Server Protocol implementation for TypeScript wrapping tsserver.
display_name_sources: Official repository README title is TypeScript Language Server.
docs_sources: Official repository contains a docs directory linked from the README for configuration documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README contains installation, CLI, configuration, and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for typescript-language-server.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: Official README says it provides LSP support for JavaScript and TypeScript editors.
source_facts.description identifies a TypeScript LSP implementation wrapping tsserver.
